creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #1)
> I will notify the maintainer and close the PR at the same time.
> 
> Bugzilla is not to be used as a way to tell maintainers that new versions
> are available.  That's what portscout is for.

Unfortunately portscout wouldn't have picked up on this because it was moved from sourceforge to github (I should have noted it in my first comment -- sorry).

> PRs of this type are immediately closed, sorry.

The maintainer is freebsd-ports.
